name: lir_llvm_wasm_codegen_subset
description: Programs the LIR toolchain can lower to LLVM IR and (with wasm-capable clang) to WebAssembly. See docs/LLVM_ABI.md#codegen-subset and docs/LIR_V1_SPEC.md §13.
rules: Optional prefix: only drop, take, and id before any filter, map, or scan.
Middle: zero or more filter, map, and id.
At most one scan; only on i32 or i64 streams (bool streams: no scan).
After scan (if present): only filter, map, id — no second scan, no take/drop in middle or suffix.
Materialized range/lit must not exceed embed size limit (see T_CODEGEN_TOO_LARGE).

cli.membership_without_emit: Phase 0 optional probe: `lir codegen-check` verifies subset membership without writing IR (same role as a hypothetical `compile --supported-only`).
